title: Refine
description: A mod that adds cleaning and combat tools against defile
body:
This is an addon for Defile, centered around removing funeral ink with *style*


# FADING
A stacking debuff applied by bleach bombs and miasma cannon, deals more damage the higher level it is

# BLEACH BOMB
Explodes with a delay, cleaning funeral ink(defile mod) and applying the fading effect in a large area

# MIASMA CANNON
Netherite tier tool similar to a bow in terms of usage, launching a weightless, extremely fast projectile which leaves a trail of bleach that can only AMPLIFY the fading debuff and remove funeral ink in a small radius around itself 
Also holding the it down for too long will cause it to overheat 
The projectile itself only applies huge knockback and the fading debuff 

# BIG BLEACH BOMB
Is a block this time around, cleans funeral ink in a much larger (~2.5x) radius, gets triggered by the other types of cleaning tools and itself
due to such, it is able to be put in chains with large gaps inbetween to cover large areas of funeral ink, while being relatively cheaper than bleach bombs.
Also, applies the fading debuff.
